error_signature: multiple entries in Google Sheets for each chunk
title: Duplicate entries in Google Sheets from chunked processing
symptom: When logging file information in Google Sheets after processing chunks, multiple entries are created for each chunk instead of a single entry per file.
not_this_if: Data is logged directly without chunking
root_cause: The workflow directly connects the output of Pinecone to Google Sheets, resulting in multiple entries for each chunk processed. Each chunk triggers a separate entry in the sheet, leading to duplicates.
fix_steps: Add a Merge node after the download step
Connect the output of the Merge node to the Google Sheets node
Configure the Merge node to consolidate data before logging
agent_instruction: Use a Merge node to combine chunk data before sending it to Google Sheets.
